transcript.final_response:
Done — converted `/data/export.tsv` to `/data/import.csv` with the requested column order and header.

Result:
```csv
email,first_name,last_name,department
alice@co.com,Alice,Smith,Eng
bob@co.com,Bob,Jones,Sales
carol@co.com,Carol,Davis,Eng
dave@co.com,Dave,Wilson,HR
```
tool_calls:
set -euo pipefail
awk -F '\t' 'BEGIN{OFS=","; print "email,first_name,last_name,department"} NR>1{print $4,$3,$2,$5}' /data/export.tsv > /data/import.csv
cat /data/import.csv

tool_outputs.commands:

awk -F '\t' 'BEGIN{OFS=","; print "email,first_name,last_name,department"} NR>1{print $4,$3,$2,$5}' /data/export.tsv > /data/import.csv
cat /data/import.csv
